missingness: No real user, patient, animal, clinical, or veterinary record is included; this is a synthetic infrastructure packet.

falsification_route: Reject this gate if typed placeholders do not reduce leakage or if they materially degrade retrieval utility against curator-scored packets.
next_executable_action: Run the validator and add this gate before reusable discovery-memory writes.
